questions.question: If f(x<sub>1</sub>) × f(x<sub>2</sub>) < 0, select most suitable option.

answers.b: x<sub>1</sub> & x<sub>2</sub>, contains at least one root

questions.question: If f(x<sub>1</sub>) × f(x<sub>2</sub>) > 0, select most suitable option.

answers.b: Root does not lie between x<sub>1</sub> & x<sub>2</sub>
answers.c: Root may lie or may not lie between x<sub>1</sub> & x<sub>2</sub>

answers.a: Equation do not have real root
answers.c: Either x<sub>1</sub> or x<sub>2</sub> is the root of the equation
answers.d: Equation cannot be solved by bisection method

questions.question: If f(x<sub>1</sub>) × f(x<sub>2</sub>) < 0, select most suitable option.

answers.a: x<sub>1</sub> & x<sub>2</sub>, contains at least one root

questions.question: If f(x<sub>1</sub>) × f(x<sub>2</sub>) > 0, select most suitable option.

answers.b: Root does not lie between x<sub>1</sub> & x<sub>2</sub>
answers.c: Root may lie or may not lie between x<sub>1</sub> & x<sub>2</sub>

answers.a: Either x<sub>1</sub> or x<sub>2</sub> is the root of the equation
answers.b: Equation do not have real root
answers.d: Equation cannot be solved by false position method

questions.question: If the convergence criteria is not satisfied

answers.a: then you will not get the root of the equation
answers.b: you may or may not get the root of the equation

questions.question: New improved approximation of root is given by

answers.c: $$ x_2 = x_1 - \frac{f(x_1)}{f'(x_1)}, \quad f'(x_1) → \text{at only first guess} \ $$
